subcodes.first_line: O ye who are aflame with the fire of God's love and are steadfast in His Covenant! Render thanks unto God that ye dwell beneath His sheltering shade [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتعلین بنار محبه الله و منتسبین ثابت بر پیمان شکر کنید خدا را که در ظل ظلیلید
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement, @firmness in the Covenant, @thankfulness; gratitude
